name: clawhub-daily
description: Daily ClawHub Skill insights: 500 skills scanned, 6-dimension all-daily recommendation (trending/quality/newcomers/panorama/actively_maintained/verified), 7 pain-points, 7-day cross-dimension dedup, fallback strategy, changelog display, multi-channel push (Lark/Feishu/IMA/Local)

network.purpose: Fetch ClawHub skill data and optionally push briefings to Feishu/IMA

filesystem.purpose: Store raw snapshots, briefing markdown, Obsidian vault copies, and fallback saves

env_vars.purpose: Optional credentials for Feishu/IMA push channels and Obsidian vault path; if unset, only local files are generated

subprocess.purpose: Optional IMA CLI fallback if official OpenAPI fails; only invoked in auto mode when CLI is installed
